default.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ r̃h̃ỹt̃h̃m̃ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽs̃ c̃ãr̃ẽf̃ũl̃ t̃ĩm̃ĩñg̃ j̃ũd̃g̃m̃ẽñt̃. ⟧⟧

irregular.text: ⟦⟦ Ĩr̃r̃ẽg̃ũl̃ãr̃ t̃ĩm̃ĩñg̃ ĩñt̃ẽr̃ṽãl̃s̃ c̃ãñ d̃ĩs̃r̃ũp̃t̃ ẽx̃p̃ẽc̃t̃ẽd̃ f̃l̃õw̃. ⟧⟧

syncopated.text: ⟦⟦ Õf̃f̃-̃b̃ẽãt̃ ẽm̃p̃h̃ãs̃ĩs̃ s̃h̃ĩf̃t̃s̃ t̃h̃ẽ p̃l̃ãỹẽr̃'s̃ t̃ĩm̃ĩñg̃ r̃ẽf̃ẽr̃ẽñc̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

mixed_patterns.text: ⟦⟦ D̃ĩf̃f̃ẽr̃ẽñt̃ r̃h̃ỹt̃h̃m̃ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ ãr̃ẽ m̃ĩx̃ẽd̃ t̃h̃r̃õũg̃h̃õũt̃. ⟧⟧
